title: AI in the SDLC: Rethinking AI Coding Tools & AI Agents
summary: Cedric Clyburn argues that while AI promises speed in software development, productivity gains are limited despite faster coding. He proposes redesigning SDLC workflows with AI agents to improve testing, outcomes, and delivery.
writeup: Cedric Clyburn examines where AI fits in the software development lifecycle, arguing that faster code generation has not translated into proportional productivity gains. The talk reframes the problem: rather than accelerating the coding step alone, AI agents should be applied across the SDLC to improve testing, outcomes, and delivery. The takeaway is that workflow redesign, not just faster coding tools, is where AI delivers value.
